title: Identity Engine v2 — modular HTML doc

teacherReviews.feedback:
Solid work across 3 rounds. The Round 2 path correction was the critical catch — 5 component paths and the markers filename were all wrong in the Round 1 draft (aspirational logger/identity/ and navigation/ paths vs actual brain/identity-engine/*). Without that fix, the doc would have been factually incorrect on every component path.

Verified against all five axes:
1. **Completeness** — All 5 sections delivered. CSS byte-identical. TOC correct. Philosophy [reserved]. 5 API functions documented. 4 hook integrations mapped.
2. **Feasibility** — All 7 sign types match engine.py's VALID_SIGNS set exactly. All 12 cadence return fields present. Salience default (0.8), dormancy threshold (15 cycles), audit sources (10 ledgers, 50 tamper entries) — all verified against code.
3. **Charter alignment** — Brain documenting its own engine. Squarely in domain.
4. **Quality** — Mutability column is a better design than the Round 1 Type column. Tightened salience guidance reads cleaner. "Manually maintained" qualifier on evolution.md is honest. 14.5 KB is proportional (smallest engine, shortest doc).
5. **Justs-readability** — Clean, consistent with rule-engine.html and recall-engine.html. No jargon. Professional presentation.
